text:
Market today:
No clear market-wide tech catalyst today. Small-cap strength is noted, but your book is mostly large-cap tech/chips. The scanner shows some long setups in tech names, indicating potential individual strength.

Your holdings:
SOXL (SELL, -44.38%) and SPAL (NEW, -40.16%) are both leveraged ETFs with significant drawdowns. These need immediate attention due to their amplified risk on margin. SMH (TRIM, -10.68%) and QQQI (TRIM, -2.29%) also warrant review.

Watch:
Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions' stops. Also, monitor tech names like ZS, PANW, and MSFT from your scanner for potential opportunities if a catalyst emerges.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your risk, especially with leveraged positions, and be selective with new entries.
plays: Review SOXL (SELL, -44.38%) and SPAL (NEW, -40.16%). Both are leveraged ETFs with significant drawdowns; manage stops and position size carefully.
Consider trimming SMH (-10.68%) and QQQI (-2.29%) as indicated by their TRIM status to reduce overall exposure.
No new buys today - hold and watch for stronger catalysts aligning with scanner setups.
